# workbench_group_iam_policy (Resource)

Workbench provisioned group IAM member resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
import {
  to = workbench_group_iam_policy.my_iam_policy
  id = "organizations/12345678-9012-3456-7890-123456789012/groups/mytestgroup/roles"
}

resource "workbench_group_iam_policy" "my_iam_policy" {
  group        = "mytestgroup"
  organization = "12345678-9012-3456-7890-123456789012"
  # Any members added or removed externally to any role will be overwritten
  iams = [
    {
      role = "MEMBER"
      principals = [
        {
          user = "alice@example.com"
        },
        {
          user = "bob@example.com"
        },
        {
          group = {
            group        = "mygroup2"
            organization = "~myorg2"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      role = "ADMIN"
      principals = [
        {
          user = "admin@example.com"
        },
      ]
    },
    {
      role = "SUPPORT"
      principals = [
        {
          user = "support@example.com"
        },
      ]
    },
  ]
}

output "group_members" {
  value = workbench_group_iam_policy.my_iam_policy.iams
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) Workbench managed group name
- `iams` (Attributes Set) Workbench group user IAM policies (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--iams))

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Workbench organization ID, either UUID or UFID. If it is a UFID, it must be prefixed with a tilde (~).

<a id="nestedatt--iams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `iams`

Required:

- `principals` (Attributes Set) List of principals (users, groups, or public) in the IAM binding. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--iams--principals))
- `role` (String) Workbench IAM role of the member

<a id="nestedatt--iams--principals"></a>
### Nested Schema for `iams.principals`

Optional:

- `group` (Attributes) Identifier of a group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--iams--principals--group))
- `public` (Boolean) True if the group is public.
- `user` (String) Email of a user.

<a id="nestedatt--iams--principals--group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `iams.principals.group`

Required:

- `group` (String) Name of the group.

Optional:

- `organization` (String) UxID of the organization. If it is a UFID, it must be prefixed with a tilde (~).
